title: List item pattern 01
summary: List item pattern 01 is built on top of the base list and list item components and supports slot-based composition for flexible layouts and supports interactive row behavior.
preamble: List item pattern 01 provides a ready-to-use row structure for displaying labels and values with support for selection, navigation, and row-level actions. Use the lead, main, and trail slots to combine icons, text and actions. This ensures consistent layout, spacing, and accessibility while allowing flexibility through slots.

overview.title: Items
overview.section-content:
Use items property to get predefined styling for 2-3 columns.

Note: Use custom content directly in the row to be slotted into main, if you want to show more columns.

columns.title: Selectable
columns.content: Enable `selectable` to show a checkbox and support checked/unchecked states.

columns.title: Href
columns.content: Add `href` to make the row interactive as a link. Displays a chevron in the trail slot.

columns.title: Selectable with href
columns.content: Combine checkbox selection and link navigation in the same row.

overview.title: Padding inline
overview.section-content: Use the `padding-inline` property to customize horizontal padding on a list item. Set to `0` to remove padding. Defaults to `s`.

overview.title: Slots
overview.section-content: List item pattern 01 is built on top of the base list and list item components and supports slot-based composition for flexible layouts and interactions.

overview.title: Lead slot
overview.section-content: Use for icons, avatars, or custom leading content. When `selectable` is enabled, it shows a checkbox.

overview.title: Main
overview.section-content: Use custom content directly in the row.

overview.title: Trail slot
overview.section-content: Use for actions such as links or buttons. When `href` is set, the row renders a chevron link in the trail.
